---
name: code-modify-order
description: When dealing with the frontend part of this project, **never** modify the backend part. By design, the backend part is always the source of truth, and the frontend part is just a client of the backend. Modifying the backend part may cause unexpected issues and bugs, and it may also cause conflicts with other developers who are working on the backend part. If you need to modify the backend part, please get approval from the user.
---
